name: shopflow
description: Event-driven order processing system — EDA demo with Node.js and AWS

scripts.infra:up: docker-compose up -d && node scripts/wait-for-localstack.js && node scripts/setup-local-aws.js
scripts.infra:reset: docker-compose down -v && docker-compose up -d && node scripts/wait-for-localstack.js && node scripts/setup-local-aws.js
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "ORDER,INVENTORY,PAYMENT,NOTIFY,AUDIT" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue" "cd services/order-service && npm run dev" "cd services/inventory-service && npm run dev" "cd services/payment-service && npm run dev" "cd services/notification-service && npm run dev" "cd services/audit-service && npm run dev"
